title: Fix slug generation with hidden grader
prompt: Fix src/text_tools.py so slugify returns lowercase URL slugs, removes punctuation, collapses repeated separators, and strips separators from the edges.

script.old:
def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    return text.lower().replace(" ", "-")

script.message: Updated slugify to normalize punctuation, repeated separators, and edge separators.

env_snapshot_commands:
python - <<'PY'
from src.text_tools import slugify
print(slugify('Snapshot: Agentic evals!'))
PY
